summary: The test suite thoroughly covers all five task requirements: glob-based file discovery, regex search, preview-with-context, backup creation, and summary reporting via Invoke-SearchReplace. TDD rounds are clearly delineated with comments, and each function gets its own Describe block. Edge cases are well represented: file-boundary context (start/end of file), case sensitivity toggle, regex backreference replacement, duplicate backup timestamps, empty result sets, and all major error paths. Design is clean — BeforeEach resets state in Invoke-SearchReplace to prevent inter-test pollution, TestDrive provides proper isolation, and assertions are focused. Two notable weaknesses: (1) the 'invalid regex' error test passes an empty file list, meaning the implementation may never evaluate the regex and the throw may never occur, making the test a false green; (2) FilePath equality assertions use raw string comparison which is fragile across OS path-separator conventions. Minor gaps include no tests for empty files, read-only files, or files with non-UTF8 encoding. Despite these issues, the suite is well-structured and would reliably catch regressions across all core behaviors.
